title: dryopteris × fauriei
intro: Dryopteris × fauriei, also known as the Fauriei fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit platelet aggregation and prevent blood clots. The Faurieri fern has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, lowering cholesterol levels, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris × fauriei can be found in tea or capsule form, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system.
